title: UI-131 — Foundation (app) route-group layout: AppShell grid + Server-Component auth guard
prompt:
# UI-131 — Foundation (app) layout Wave: `app-shell-foundation-20260520` (00-foundation). Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`. ## Goal Replace the T-133 pass-through stub at `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx` with the real AppShell grid (Sidebar + Topbar + main) and add a Server-Component defence-in-depth auth check. Edge auth in `proxy.ts` stays primary; this layout is the second gate and the shell host for every authenticated desktop route. ## Source - Brief `/tmp/monopilot-shell-gap-brief-combined.md` §3 Luka A + Luka G. - Prototype layout: sidebar 280px + topbar 56px + main content; settings/shell.jsx is the canonical layout shape. ## Files (scope) - `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx` [modify — replace stub] - `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/__tests__/layout.test.tsx` [create — RTL for auth guard branches] - `apps/web/e2e/app-shell-layout.spec.ts` [create — Playwright smoke: assert sidebar + topbar appear on `/en/`] - `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/loading.tsx` [create — minimal shell skeleton, sidebar + topbar widths preserved, content area `
`] Do NOT modify `proxy.ts`, `[locale]/layout.tsx`, `[locale]/(auth)/layout.tsx`, `[locale]/(scanner)/layout.tsx`, or any T-XXX.json outside this wave. ## Contract ```tsx // apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx (Server Component) export default async function AppLayout({ children, params, }: { children: ReactNode; params: Promise<{ locale: string }> }) { const { locale } = await params; const supabase = await createServerSupabaseClient(); const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.getUser(); if (error || !data.user) { redirect(`/${locale}/login`); } return (
{children}
); } ``` Uses tokens from UI-127. Mounts UI-129 + UI-130. The Server-Component guard is defence-in-depth — if `proxy.ts` already redirected, this branch is unreachable, but a misconfigured proxy must not leak shell. ## Acceptance criteria 1. Visiting `/en/` while authenticated renders `data-testid=app-shell`, `data-testid=app-sidebar`, `data-testid=app-topbar`, and the existing `[locale]/page.tsx` content under `data-testid=app-shell-main`. 2. Visiting `/en/` while unauthenticated (no Supabase cookie) results in HTTP 307/302 to `/en/login`; the response body never contains `data-testid=app-shell`. 3. `/en/login` (under `(auth)`) DOES NOT contain `data-testid=app-shell`, `app-sidebar`, or `app-topbar`. 4. RTL `__tests__/layout.test.tsx` covers: authenticated render, unauth redirect, locale prefix propagation to topbar/sidebar. 5. Playwright `app-shell-layout.spec.ts` asserts the three test-ids appear on `/en/` and are absent on `/en/login`. 6. axe-core (rendered tree) reports 0 violations. 7. `pnpm --filter web typecheck` and `lint` pass. 8. `apps/web/proxy.ts` is byte-identical before/after. ## Out of scope - Settings sub-nav (UI-132). - PageHeader primitive (UI-132). - Scanner shell (T-134). - New URLs / locale changes. - Modifying any T-XXX.json outside this wave. ## RED test Write layout.test.tsx and app-shell-layout.spec.ts first — fail because layout still passes through. ## Risk red lines - Auth guard belongs in Server Component, NOT in middleware/proxy (avoid conflict with edge i18n). - Use the existing `createServerSupabaseClient` helper from `apps/web/lib/auth/supabase-server.ts`. - Do not import `proxy.ts`-only helpers (edge runtime) here. - Do not introduce `` boundaries that swallow children — child errors must surface to the App Router error boundary. - Do not let `loading.tsx` drop sidebar/topbar dimensions (would cause layout shift). ## Closeout (fail-closed) Provide: screenshots desktop-1280 + 1440 (authenticated `/en/` + unauthenticated `/en/login`), screenshot_or_dom_diff_artifacts, visual_parity_evidence (cite prototype settings/shell.jsx layout), prototype_reference, console_network_check (no errors, no failed requests, no hydration warnings), acceptance_criteria_status, test_commands_and_results, changed_files, git_status, deviations_from_prototype. `ui_parity_evidence_missing` blocks closeout.

prd_refs: brief §7 risk: auth Server vs middleware
pipeline_inputs.description: Replace (app)/layout.tsx pass-through with the AppShell CSS-grid (Topbar + Sidebar + Main) and a Server-Component Supabase auth guard. Mounts UI-129 and UI-130. proxy.ts unchanged.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component reads locale from params, calls createServerSupabaseClient().auth.getUser(); redirect to /<locale>/login on error/no user. Otherwise render CSS grid using --shell-topbar-h and --shell-sidebar-w with AppTopbar (header, col-span-2), AppSidebar (aside), main (overflow-auto). loading.tsx preserves shell dimensions. RTL test covers authed/unauthed branches. Playwright spec asserts test-ids on /en/ and their absence on /en/login.
acceptance_criteria: /en/ authenticated renders data-testid=app-shell, app-sidebar, app-topbar; main holds existing page content
/en/ unauthenticated redirects 302/307 to /en/login; response body does not contain data-testid=app-shell
/en/login response body does not contain data-testid=app-shell or app-sidebar or app-topbar
RTL layout.test.tsx covers authed, unauthed, locale-prop propagation
test_strategy: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web lint
risk_red_lines: Auth guard belongs in Server Component, not in middleware/proxy
Do not import edge-runtime helpers here
Do not introduce a Suspense boundary that swallows child errors
loading.tsx must keep sidebar/topbar dimensions (no layout shift)
